final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: digital illustration
Asset type: fantasy illustration, epic scene
Primary request: deep-sea fantasy world with ancient underwater ruins and bioluminescent creatures
Scene/backdrop: ancient civilization ruins at thousands of meters deep ocean floor, massive stone columns and arches covered in coral and sea anemones, ruins scattered across the seabed
Subject: mermaid princess in ancient attire inspecting a mysterious rune-carved stone tablet at center, giant jellyfish emitting blue-purple glow, transparent deep-sea fish with self-luminous organs, giant octopus tentacles reaching from darkness in the distance
Style/medium: digital painting, highly detailed fantasy art
Composition/framing: wide establishing shot, layered depth from foreground ruins to distant darkness
Lighting/mood: bioluminescent glow creating ethereal atmosphere, mysterious and dreamlike
Color palette: deep blue-black base with bioluminescent accents of cyan-green, purple, and golden light points
Materials/textures: weathered ancient stone with coral overgrowth, translucent jellyfish bells, iridescent fish scales
Constraints: maintain the mermaid princess as focal point, preserve the ancient rune tablet detail, ensure bioluminescent creatures are clearly visible
Avoid: flat lighting, oversaturated colors, cartoonish proportions, cluttered composition without focal point
